title: Curver My Style 55 Litre Rattan Effect Laundry Hamper, Vintage White
description: From the manufacturer Curver My Style 55 L Rattan Effect Laundry Hamper, Vintage White Curver’s My Style range is the perfect mix between the attractiveness of its natural fibre rattan style with the convenience of resin. My Style is our multi functional range that comes in a wide variety of products that includes storage boxes, laundry hampers, baskets and organisers, all of which will suit any room of your home used on their own or as part of a set. The My Style 55 litre laundry hamper will take pride of place in any bathroom, bedroom or utility room, whilst also being practical and hard wearing. It has a large 55 litre capacity and, with its natural fibre open weave, it is designed to give good ventilation that will keep odours to a minimum. It comes with a large easy access lid and comfortable handles to make usage a pleasure. This hamper is easy to clean and it will stay looking good for years.
